description: The fix worker is supervised the same way as a dispatch worker (Issue #1468): #200's fix worker idles after its first turn without committing, so the loop nudges it once; on the second turn it commits, re-verifies, re-merges, and UAT passes within the attempt cap. The fix worker was sent twice (initial + one nudge), proving the fix loop drives to a commit rather than trusting the first idle.
